_description: This file is the authoritative payload contract for all WebSocket events. Every developer must conform to these schemas. Do not change event names or field names without updating this file and api-contracts.md.

1_vital_update._description: Broadcast every 2 seconds for each simulator reading. One vital per message.

_field_descriptions.vital: Vital sign name. One of: SpO2 | HR | RR | FiO2 | PEEP | Tidal Volume
_field_descriptions.threshold: Reference threshold boundary closest to the value

2_alert_event._description: Broadcast whenever a vital crosses a critical or alarm threshold. Multiple alerts possible per cycle.

_field_descriptions.vital: Name of the vital that breached threshold
_field_descriptions.value: Observed value that triggered the alert
_field_descriptions.timestamp: ISO-8601 timestamp when alert was generated

3_doctor_instruction._description: Sent by a doctor client via WebSocket. Broadcast to all connected clients. Stored in server history (last 20).
3_doctor_instruction.message: Increase FiO2 to 40% — patient showing signs of desaturation.

_field_descriptions.sender: Role of the sending client — always 'doctor' for instructions
_field_descriptions.message: Free-text clinical instruction entered by the doctor
_field_descriptions.timestamp: ISO-8601 timestamp added server-side on receipt

_notes: Only clients with role=doctor may send instructions.
Nurse clients receive instructions as read-only broadcasts.
The server stores the last 20 instructions in memory.

4_ai_suggestion._description: Future Phase 2 event. Generated by OpenAI GPT-4o based on patient context. Currently returns mock data.

data.suggestion: Patient SpO2 at 87% — consider increasing FiO2 to 50% and verifying ETT position. Reassess ABG in 30 minutes.
data.disclaimer: AI-generated suggestion. Requires physician review before clinical action.

_field_descriptions.patient_context: Snapshot of patient data used to generate the suggestion
_field_descriptions.suggestion: Clinical recommendation text from the AI model
_field_descriptions.confidence: HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW — based on AI response metadata
_field_descriptions.disclaimer: Mandatory disclaimer — AI is advisory only

5_weaning_score._description: Broadcast on demand or periodically. Contains weaning readiness evaluation from weaning_engine.

_field_descriptions.max_score: Maximum possible score (sum of all criterion weights)
_field_descriptions.criteria_met: List of criterion names that were satisfied
_field_descriptions.criteria_not_met: List of criterion names that were not satisfied
_field_descriptions.vitals_snapshot: Full vitals dict used for evaluation

6_history_event._description: Sent to a newly connected client. Contains the last 20 doctor instructions stored on the server.

data.message: Reduce PEEP to 8 — patient tolerating well.
Increase FiO2 to 40% — patient showing signs of desaturation.

_field_descriptions.data: Array of past instruction objects, oldest first

7_client_connected._description: Internal server log event. Not broadcast to clients. Logged when a new WebSocket connection is established.

8_client_disconnected._description: Internal server log event. Not broadcast to clients. Logged when a WebSocket connection closes.
